headline: JPMorgan, Pimco say bond market is underestimating slowdown risk
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Some of Wall Street’s biggest bond-fund managers say financial markets are underestimating the risk that the US war in Iran will cause a sharp slowdown in an already sputtering economy. As oil pushes over $110 a barrel and the conflict shows little signs of ending, traders have largely focused on the inflation shock.
